message:
🐛 Fix CNCF test suite findings: security, licensing, and deps (#1668)

- Fix decrypt() panic on malformed nonce (crypto.go nonce length validation)
- Fix 17 integer overflow conversions with safeInt32/safeFloat64ToInt32
- Fix unsafe int-to-rune conversion in metrics_history.go (use strconv.Itoa)
- Add Apache-2.0 LICENSE file at repo root
- Add license field to web/package.json
- Update Go deps: Fiber v2.52.12, x/net v0.51.0, x/text v0.34.0
- Fix mission-security-test grep to match fullScan import pattern
- Fix error-boundary-test unguarded array threshold (50 -> 200)
- Add govulncheck timeout (120s) to dependency-audit-test

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ import (
 	"log"
 	"os"
 	"path/filepath"
+	"strconv"
 	"sync"
 	"time"
 
@@ -338,7 +339,7 @@ func (mh *MetricsHistory) GetTrendContext() string {
 		recent = recent[len(recent)-6:]
 	}
